---
name: Feature Request
about: Request a new feature for py
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve.

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases
Describe specific use cases for this feature:
1. Use case 1...
2. Use case 2...

## Examples
If applicable, provide examples of how the feature would work:

```bash
# Example command usage
py new-command --option value
```

## Comparison with Other Tools
How do other package managers (pip, uv, poetry, pdm) handle this?

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided specific use cases
- [ ] I have considered alternative solutions
